caption: A man with a shaved head, a dark beard, and tattoos on his right arm is recording in a studio setting. He wears a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm, which features the text "Rode" on its side. The background consists of dark grey acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking into the microphone. He begins by gesturing with his right hand, which is blurred due to movement, while looking slightly to his left. As the sequence progresses, his hand lowers and moves out of the frame, and he continues speaking, shifting his gaze and adjusting his facial expression as he talks. The camera angle remains a static medium close-up throughout the clip.
